name: record
description: Adapter skills for the Homebrew-installed record CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Capture, transcribe, and follow meetings live.
interface.longDescription: Record exposes capture, transcription, and live meeting skills for the Homebrew-installed record CLI. It can stream local ScreenCaptureKit app audio into on-device transcription so an active agent can surface timely, timestamp-grounded context and questions.
defaultPrompt: Use $capture to record a visible Mac app.
Use $transcribe to transcribe a local media file.
Use $live to follow a visible meeting and surface timestamp-grounded context and questions.
